mapper.select: SELECT id FROM knowledge_entry WHERE id = #{entryId} AND status = 1
SELECT id FROM knowledge_entry WHERE id = #{entryId} AND status = 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_file SET is_current = 0 WHERE entry_id = #{entryId} AND is_current = 1 AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_file ( id, entry_id, original_file_name, file_ext, file_size, file_url, upload_status, upload_error_msg, is_current, uploaded_by, uploaded_at, status ) VALUES ( #{fileId}, #{entryId}, #{originalFileName}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{fileUrl}, 'success', NULL, 1, NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT('', id) AS file_id, CONCAT('', entry_id) AS entry_id, original_file_name, file_ext AS file_type, file_size, file_url, upload_status, is_current, uploaded_at FROM knowledge_file WHERE id = #{fileId} AND status = 1
